query:
INSERT INTO machines
              (id, organization_id, plan_id, name, make, model, serial_number, asset_tag,
               public_code, location, year_installed, status, primary_photo_version_id,
               created_by, created_at, updated_at)
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
